ogTitle: Pambula Beach vs Pan Ban: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pambula Beach and Pan Ban.
heading: Pambula Beach vs Pan Ban — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pambula Beach, New South Wales and Pan Ban, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pan Ban has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Pambula Beach (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pambula Beach or Pan Ban safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pambula Beach has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Pan Ban scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pambula Beach scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Pan Ban scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pambula Beach or Pan Ban?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pan Ban has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
